zh.lifeSummary: 當Adolf I von Dassel Nienover und von Ratzeburg於大約1160年出生在德國海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福艾音貝可達瑟爾時，他的父親Hermann von Dassel23歲，母親Walderis28歲。他和Gfn Adelheid von Wassel Gfn Hallermund至少有2個女兒。他去世於1224年在德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 諾特海姆享年65歲。

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Dassel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Vassell
meanings: English (East Yorkshire): of Norman origin, a status name from Old French vassel ‘vassal, servant, dependent’ (from Late Latin vazallus), used for a retainer who was under the protection of a king or powerful lord.

nameMeanings.name: und
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Runte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Erhard.

German: in the northwest of Germany most probably a topographic name from a field name based on run ‘mud’, which gave rise to several placenames in the Rhine-Ruhr area, for example Runten, Runtenberg, Rünthe near Hamm, Westphalia.

en.lifeSummary: When Adolf I von Dassel Nienover und von Ratzeburg was born about 1160, in Dassel, Einbeck, Hanover, Prussia, Germany, his father, Hermann von Dassel, was 23 and his mother, Walderis, was 28. He had at least 2 daughters with Gfn Adelheid von Wassel Gfn Hallermund. He died in 1224, in Northeim, Lower Saxony, Germany, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adolf I von Dassel Nienover und von Ratzeburg est né environ 1160, à Dassel, Einbeck, Hanovre, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Hermann von Dassel, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Walderis, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Gfn Adelheid von Wassel Gfn Hallermund. Il est décédé en 1224, à Landkreis Northeim, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adolf I von Dassel Nienover und von Ratzeburg um 1160 in Dassel, Einbeck, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hermann von Dassel 23 und seine Mutter Walderis 28. Er hatte mit Gfn Adelheid von Wassel Gfn Hallermund mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb 1224 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Landkreis Northeim, Niedersachsen, Deutschland.

Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie con Gfn Adelheid von Wassel Gfn Hallermund. Morì nel 1224, nel Landkreis Northeim, Niedersachsen, Germania, all'età di 65 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Adolf I von Dassel Nienover und von Ratzeburg(이)가 대략 1160년 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 해노버 아이벡 다셀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hermann von Dassel(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Walderis(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Gfn Adelheid von Wassel Gfn Hallermund(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1224년 독일 니더작센 랜드크레이스 노르테임에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adolf I von Dassel Nienover und von Ratzeburg родился около 1160 г. в местности дассел, эинбекк, провинз ханновир, Пруссия, Германия, его отцу по имени Hermann von Dassel было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Walderis, 28. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Gfn Adelheid von Wassel Gfn Hallermund. Он умер в 1224 г. в местности ландкрис нортим, ниедирсачсен, Германия в возрасте 65 лет.
